scripts.build: bun run scripts/generate-search-index.ts && next build && bun run scripts/cname.js
scripts.build:pages: bun run scripts/generate-search-index.ts && GITHUB_PAGES=true NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL='https://sraveshnandan.github.io/mcpkit' next build && bun run scripts/cname.js
scripts.build:custom: export GITHUB_PAGES=true CUSTOM_DOMAIN=true NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL='https://mcpkit.js.org' && bun run scripts/generate-search-index.ts && next build && bun run scripts/cname.js
